rules.description: For topology Reversi, replace fixed corner/X-square concepts with graph anchors, low-degree regions, stable rays, frontier exposure, and mobility on the actual adjacency graph.
Do not apply WTHOR standard-board openings directly on torus, cylinder, polar, Mobius, RP2, 3D, or 4D boards; use self-play books and transfer mobility, frontier, stability, and parity features only.
